info.title: Mittwald MCP Tools API
info.description: MCP tool definitions and specifications for Mittwald hosting platform

post.description: Copy an app within a project.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

description.description: Set a description for the new app installation

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Create a Node.js app.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint file for the Node.js application

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the app to be ready

waitTimeout.description: Timeout for the wait operation in seconds

post.description: Create a PHP app.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

documentRoot.description: Document root directory for the PHP application

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the app to be ready

waitTimeout.description: Timeout for the wait operation in seconds

post.description: Create a PHP worker app.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint file for the PHP worker application

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the app to be ready

waitTimeout.description: Timeout for the wait operation in seconds

post.description: Create a Python app.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint file for the Python application

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the app to be ready

waitTimeout.description: Timeout for the wait operation in seconds

post.description: Create a static app.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

documentRoot.description: Document root directory for the static application

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the app to be ready

waitTimeout.description: Timeout for the wait operation in seconds

post.description: Get all available system software dependencies and optionally filter by app type or installation.

appType.description: Optional filter by application type tag (for example 'wordpress', 'nodejs', 'php').

appId.description: Optional app installation ID (format: a-XXXXX) used to enrich results with current versions.

includeMetadata.description: Include metadata returned by the CLI in the response payload.

post.description: Update one or more system software dependencies for an app installation.

dependency.description: Name of a dependency to update (e.g., php, node). Use together with the version field.

version.description: Target version or version range for the dependency specified in the dependency field.

updates.description: List of dependency updates to apply in one request.

updatePolicy.description: Update policy to apply after updating the dependency set.

quiet.description: Suppress progress output and only return a summary from the CLI.

post.description: Fetch available versions for a specific system software dependency.

dependency.description: Name of the dependency to retrieve versions for (e.g., php, node, composer).

versionRange.description: Optional semver constraint to filter the returned versions.

recommendedOnly.description: Return only versions flagged as recommended.

includeDependencies.description: Include nested dependency metadata in the response payload.

post.description: Download the filesystem of an app within a project to your local machine.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

target.description: Target directory to download the app installation to

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with; if omitted, your own user will be used

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

exclude.description: Exclude files matching the given patterns

dryRun.description: Do not actually download the app installation

delete.description: Delete local files that are not present on the server

remoteSubDirectory.description: Specify a sub-directory within the app installation to download

post.description: Get details about an app installation.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

post.description: Install Contao application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Contao version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install Joomla application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Joomla version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install Matomo application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Matomo version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install Nextcloud application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Nextcloud version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install Shopware 5 application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Shopware 5 version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install Shopware 6 application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: Shopware 6 version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install TYPO3 application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: TYPO3 version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

installMode.description: Installation mode (composer or symlink, defaults to composer if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: Install WordPress application.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project

version.description: WordPress version to install (defaults to latest if not specified)

host.description: Host to configure the app with

quiet.description: Only output the installation ID

waitTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait in seconds

post.description: List installed apps in a project.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this flag is optional if a default project is set in the context

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output (only relevant for txt output)

noRelativeDates.description: Show dates in absolute format, not relative (only relevant for txt output)

csvSeparator.description: Separator for CSV output (only relevant for CSV output)

post.description: List upgrade candidates for an app installation.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output (only relevant for txt output)

noRelativeDates.description: Show dates in absolute format, not relative (only relevant for txt output)

csvSeparator.description: Separator for CSV output (only relevant for CSV output)

post.description: Open an app installation in the browser.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

post.description: Connect to an app via SSH.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with; if omitted, your own user will be used

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

cd.description: Change to installation path after connecting

info.description: Only print connection information, without actually connecting

post.description: Uninstall an app.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Update properties of an app installation. (use upgrade to update the app version)

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

description.description: Update the description of the app installation

entrypoint.description: Update the entrypoint of the app installation (Python and Node.js only)

documentRoot.description: Update the document root of the app installation

post.description: Upgrade app installation to target version.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

targetVersion.description: Target version to upgrade app to; if omitted, target version will be prompted interactively

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this flag is optional if a default project is set in the context

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the resource to be ready

waitTimeout.description: The duration to wait for the resource to be ready (common units like ms, s, m are accepted)

post.description: Upload the filesystem of an app to a project.

installationId.description: ID or short ID of an app installation; this argument is optional if a default app installation is set in the context

source.description: Source directory from which to upload the app installation

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with; if omitted, your own user will be used

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

exclude.description: Exclude files matching the given patterns

dryRun.description: Do not actually upload the app installation

delete.description: Delete remote files that are not present locally

remoteSubDirectory.description: Specify a sub-directory within the app installation to upload

post.description: List supported Apps and Versions.

app.description: Name of specific app to get versions for

post.description: Create a new backup

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

expires.description: Set an expiration date for the backup (format: 30d, 1y, 30m etc.)

description.description: Set a description for the backup

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

wait.description: Wait for the backup to be completed

post.description: Delete a backup

backupId.description: ID or short ID of a backup

confirm.description: Must be set to true to confirm deletion (DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION - cannot be undone).

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Download a backup

backupId.description: ID or short ID of a backup

generatePassword.description: Generate a random password for encryption

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Get details of a backup

backupId.description: ID or short ID of a backup

post.description: List backups

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

output.description: Output format (txt, json, yaml, csv, tsv)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute dates instead of relative dates

post.description: Create a backup schedule.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

schedule.description: Cron expression for the backup schedule

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Delete a backup schedule.

backupScheduleId.description: ID or short ID of a backup schedule

confirm.description: Must be set to true to confirm deletion (DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION - cannot be undone).

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: List backup schedules.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this argument is optional if a default project is set in the context

output.description: Output format (txt, json, yaml, csv, tsv)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute dates instead of relative dates

post.description: Update a backup schedule.

backupScheduleId.description: ID or short ID of a backup schedule

schedule.description: Cron expression for the backup schedule

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: List SSL/TLS certificates available for a domain.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this flag is optional if a default project is set in the context

domain.description: Domain name to list certificates for

output.description: Output format (internally converted to JSON for processing)

post.description: Request a new SSL/TLS certificate for a domain using Let's Encrypt.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; this flag is optional if a default project is set in the context

domain.description: Domain name to request a certificate for

autoRenew.description: Enable automatic renewal of the certificate (default: true)

subdomains.description: Additional subdomains to include in the certificate (e.g., www, api)

post.description: Delete a container.

containerId.description: ID or short ID of the container to delete

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

confirm.description: Must be set to true to confirm deletion (DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION - cannot be undone).

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: List containers belonging to a project.

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

noHeader.description: Hide table header (only relevant for table output)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output (only relevant for table output)

noRelativeDates.description: Show dates in absolute format, not relative

csvSeparator.description: Separator for CSV output (only relevant for CSV output)

post.description: Display logs of a specific container.

containerId.description: ID of the container for which to get logs

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

noPager.description: Disable pager for output (always true in CLI context)

post.description: Recreate a container.

containerId.description: ID or short ID of the container to recreate

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

pull.description: Pull the container image before recreating the container

force.description: Also recreate the container when it is already up to date

post.description: Restart a container.

containerId.description: ID or short ID of the container to restart

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Create and start a new container.

command.description: Override the default command specified in the container image

args.description: Runtime arguments passed to the command

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

env.description: Set environment variables in the container (format: KEY=VALUE)

description.description: Add a descriptive label to the container

entrypoint.description: Override the default entrypoint of the container image

name.description: Assign a custom name to the container

publish.description: Publish container ports to the host (format: host-port:container-port)

publishAll.description: Publish all ports that are defined in the image

volume.description: Bind mount volumes to the container (format: host-path:container-path)

post.description: Start a stopped container.

containerId.description: ID or short ID of the container to start

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Stop a running container.

containerId.description: ID or short ID of the container to stop

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project (optional if default project is set in context)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Updates attributes of an existing container such as image, environment variables, port mappings, and volumes.

containerId.description: Container ID or short ID to update

env.description: Environment variables in KEY=VALUE format. Multiple values can be specified.

envFile.description: Paths to files containing environment variables (one KEY=VALUE per line). Multiple files can be specified.

description.description: Update the descriptive label of the container

entrypoint.description: Override the entrypoint of the container

command.description: Update the command to run in the container (overrides image default)

publish.description: Port mappings in format <host-port>:<container-port> or just <container-port>. Multiple mappings can be specified.

publishAll.description: Automatically publish all ports exposed by the container image

volume.description: Volume mounts in format <host-path>:<container-path> or <named-volume>:<container-path>. Multiple volumes can be specified.

recreate.description: Recreate the container after updating to apply changes immediately

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

projectId.description: Project ID or short ID (optional if default project is set in context)

post.description: Get current user context from Redis session (session-aware, multi-tenant safe)

output.description: The output format to use; use "txt" for a human readable text representation, "json" for a machine-readable JSON representation, or "yaml" for YAML format

post.description: Reset (clear) all user context parameters in Redis session (session-aware, multi-tenant safe)
Set user context in Redis session (session-aware, multi-tenant safe)

projectId.description: The project ID to set as context for this user session

serverId.description: The server ID to set as context for this user session

orgId.description: The organization ID to set as context for this user session

installationId.description: The installation ID to set as context for this user session

stackId.description: The stack ID to set as context for this user session

post.description: List conversation categories.

output.description: Output format (txt, json, yaml, csv, tsv)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute dates instead of relative dates

conversationId.description: ID of the conversation to close

editor.description: Editor to use for message input

post.description: Show details of a conversation.

conversationId.description: ID of the conversation to show

post.description: List all databases.

projectId.description: Optional project ID to filter databases by project

output.description: Output format (default: json for structured data)

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute dates instead of relative dates

post.description: List available MySQL character sets and collations.

output.description: Output format (default: json for structured data)

noHeader.description: Hide table header (only relevant for txt output)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output (only relevant for txt output)

noRelativeDates.description: Show dates in absolute format, not relative (only relevant for txt output)

csvSeparator.description: Separator for CSV output (only relevant for CSV output)

post.description: Create a new MySQL database.

version.description: The MySQL version to use (use 'database mysql versions' command to list available versions)

projectId.description: ID or short ID of a project; optional if a default project is set in the context

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

characterSet.description: The character set to use (default: utf8mb4)

userPassword.description: The password to use for the default user

userExternal.description: Enable external access for default user

userAccessLevel.description: The access level preset for the default user (default: full)

post.description: Delete a MySQL database.

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

confirm.description: Must be set to true to confirm deletion (DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION - cannot be undone).

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

post.description: Create a dump of a MySQL database.

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

output.description: The output file to write the dump to ('-' for stdout)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

mysqlPassword.description: The password to use for the MySQL user (security risk - prefer environment variable MYSQL_PWD)

mysqlCharset.description: The character set to use for the MySQL connection

temporaryUser.description: Create a temporary user for the dump (recommended for security)

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

gzip.description: Compress the dump with gzip (recommended for large databases)

post.description: Get a MySQL database.

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

output.description: Output format (default: json for structured data)

post.description: Import a dump into a MySQL database.

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

input.description: The input file from which to read the dump ('-' for stdin)

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

mysqlPassword.description: The password to use for the MySQL user (security risk - prefer environment variable MYSQL_PWD)

mysqlCharset.description: The character set to use for the MySQL connection

temporaryUser.description: Create a temporary user for the import (recommended for security)

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

gzip.description: Uncompress the dump with gzip while importing

post.description: List MySQL databases.

projectId.description: Optional project ID to filter databases by project

output.description: Output format (default: json for structured data)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute dates instead of relative dates

post.description: Open phpMyAdmin for a MySQL database (provides command for browser execution)

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

post.description: Forward the TCP port of a MySQL database to a local port (provides command for long-running execution)

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

port.description: The local TCP port to forward to (default: 3306)

post.description: Connect to a MySQL database via the MySQL shell (provides command for interactive execution)

databaseId.description: The ID or name of the database

quiet.description: Suppress process output and only display a machine-readable summary

sshUser.description: Override the SSH user to connect with

sshIdentityFile.description: The SSH identity file (private key) to use for public key authentication

mysqlPassword.description: The password to use for the MySQL user (security risk - prefer environment variable MYSQL_PWD)

mysqlCharset.description: The character set to use for the MySQL connection

post.description: Create a new MySQL user for a database.

databaseId.description: ID or short ID of the MySQL database (format: mysql-XXXXX).

description.description: Friendly description shown in mStudio (defaults to username when provided).

username.description: Optional alias for description when creating the MySQL user.

accessLevel.description: Access permissions for the MySQL user (defaults to full).

password.description: Password for the MySQL user. A secure password is generated when omitted.

enableExternalAccess.description: Enable external access for this MySQL user.

accessIpMask.description: Restrict external access to a specific IPv4/IPv6 address or CIDR mask.

quiet.description: Request quiet CLI output (recommended for machine-readable responses).

post.description: Delete an existing MySQL user.

userId.description: ID or short ID of the MySQL user to delete (format: mysql-user-XXXXX).

confirm.description: Must be set to true to confirm deletion (DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION - cannot be undone).

force.description: Skip confirmation prompts when deleting the user.

quiet.description: Suppress CLI output for machine-friendly responses.

post.description: Retrieve details for a specific MySQL user.

userId.description: ID or short ID of the MySQL user to retrieve.

outputFormat.description: Preferred CLI output format. JSON enables structured responses.

post.description: List MySQL users for a database.

databaseId.description: ID or short ID of the MySQL database to list users for.

outputFormat.description: Preferred CLI output format. JSON enables structured responses.

extended.description: Include extended columns such as access level.

noHeader.description: Hide table headers for text and CSV output.

noTruncate.description: Disable truncation for wide text output.

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute timestamps instead of relative strings.

post.description: Update properties of an existing MySQL user.

userId.description: ID or short ID of the MySQL user to update.

accessLevel.description: Adjust access permissions for the MySQL user.

password.description: Set a new password for the MySQL user.

accessIpMask.description: Restrict external access to a specific IP or CIDR mask.

enableExternalAccess.description: Enable external access for this user.

disableExternalAccess.description: Disable external access for this user.

quiet.description: Suppress CLI output for machine-friendly responses.

post.description: List available MySQL versions.

output.description: Output format (default: json for structured data)

noHeader.description: Hide table header (only relevant for txt output)

noTruncate.description: Do not truncate output (only relevant for txt output)

noRelativeDates.description: Show dates in absolute format, not relative (only relevant for txt output)

csvSeparator.description: Separator for CSV output (only relevant for CSV output)

post.description: Provision a new Redis database within a project.

projectId.description: Project ID or short ID for the Redis database (format: p-XXXXX).

description.description: Human-readable description for the Redis database.

version.description: Redis version to deploy (see redis versions tool for options).

persistent.description: Enable persistent storage. Defaults to true.

maxMemoryPolicy.description: Redis eviction policy applied when memory limit is reached.

quiet.description: Suppress CLI output for machine-friendly responses.

post.description: Retrieve details for a Redis database.

redisId.description: ID or short ID of the Redis database to retrieve.

outputFormat.description: Preferred CLI output format. JSON enables structured responses.

post.description: List Redis databases for a project.

projectId.description: Project ID or short ID used to filter Redis databases.

outputFormat.description: Preferred CLI output format. JSON enables structured responses.

extended.description: Include extended columns such as status and hostname.

noHeader.description: Hide table headers for text and CSV output.

noTruncate.description: Disable truncation for wide text output.

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute timestamps instead of relative strings.

post.description: List available Redis versions for deployment.

projectId.description: Optional project context used to filter available versions.

outputFormat.description: Preferred CLI output format. JSON enables structured responses.

extended.description: Include additional metadata about each version.

noHeader.description: Hide table headers for text and CSV output.

noTruncate.description: Disable truncation for wide text output.

noRelativeDates.description: Show absolute timestamps instead of relative strings.
